query: Interview me until you understand what I actually want.
Ask me one question at a time before you plan this feature.
Grill me on this architecture idea before we commit to it.
My request is vague; help me clarify the outcome and constraints first.
Do not code yet—stress-test what I mean by a scalable service.
Figure out who this feature is really for by interviewing me.
Plan customer interviews for validating my startup idea.
Add a --verbose flag to this CLI.
Write a requirements specification from these confirmed notes.
Run an EventStorming workshop for the claims domain.
